examples: They accredit these views to him.
We accredit him with finding that book.
vt. We accredit the invention of the electric light to Adison.
It was also concerned by the refusal to accredit Jestina Mukoko, director of the Zimbabwe Peace Project, Zesn said.
The BDA does not accredit a toothpaste for a whitening claim alone but accreditation can be given to toothpastes that demonstrate effective cleaning alongside dental health benefits.
